# Vendored Assets

## opensheetmusicdisplay.min.js

- Source: https://github.com/opensheetmusicdisplay/opensheetmusicdisplay
- Version: 1.9.0 (browser UMD build)
- License: BSD-3-Clause
- Downloaded once and committed here so the Web MVP can render MusicXML in the
  browser without an external CDN request, per `SECURITY_BOUNDARY.md` local-first policy.
- Served by `app/web/server.py` at `/static/vendor/opensheetmusicdisplay.min.js`.
